items.title: Telegram Is Still Hosting a Sanctioned $21 Billion Crypto Scammer Black Market
items.summary: The UK designated Xinbi Guarantee as an enabler of crypto scammers and human trafficking weeks ago. Telegram is still hosting it in plain sight.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Someone planted backdoors in dozens of WordPress plug-ins used in thousands of websites
items.summary: Dozens of WordPress plug-ins were allegedly hijacked to push malware after they were sold to a new corporate owner.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Prime Video is bundling Apple TV Plus and Peacock for a limited time
